Bob Dylan, 2/6/02, Charleston, SC, North Charleston Coliseum, 2CDR

Surely derived from the only other circulating recording, the fingerprints matches.Great sound

CD1

60:16, 1. I Am The Man, Thomas, 2. It Ain't Me, Babe, 3. It's Alright, Ma (I'm Only Bleeding), 4. Searching For A Soldier's Grave, 5. Tweedle Dee & Tweedle Dum, 6. Tonight I'll Be Staying Here With You, 7. Cry A While, 8. High Water (for Charlie Patton), 9. One Too Many Mornings, 10. Masters Of War,
